approaches.label: Fair value hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 expressly includes fair value hedges of recognised assets or liabilities, making the foreign currency risk on a recognised intragroup dividend receivable/payable a credible model to assess in consolidated financial statements.

approaches.label: Cash flow hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 also recognises cash flow hedges for foreign currency risk associated with recognised assets or liabilities and with qualifying intragroup transactions, so this is a distinct hedge-accounting model that could plausibly be tested here.
